inputs.description: Follow Task 7 in the plan exactly. (1) Install packages: cd frontend && npm install maplibre-gl react-map-gl @deck.gl/core @deck.gl/layers @deck.gl/react. (2) Add Vite proxy for /network — edit frontend/vite.config.ts and add '/network': { target: 'http://localhost:8000', changeOrigin: true } alongside existing proxy entries. (3) Verify: cd frontend && node -e "require('maplibre-gl'); require('react-map-gl'); console.log('OK')". Commit package.json, package-lock.json, vite.config.ts.
